title: micromeles needhamii
intro: Micromeles needhamii, also known as the Chinese hawthorn or May Hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeles needhamii include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Micromeles needhamii is often prepared in herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in the form of capsules and tablets, to harness its medicinal properties.
